instructions: Grill eggplant then peel and chop. Mix with tomato onion salted egg vinegar salt and pepper. Serve as side dish.

ingredients: green mango; tomato; onion; bagoong; sugar optional; chili optional
normalized_ingredients: green mango; tomato; onion; bagoong; sugar optional; chili optional
instructions: Slice green mango and mix with tomato onion and bagoong. Add chili or sugar if desired. Serve chilled.

ingredients: green papaya; carrot; ginger; bell pepper; vinegar; sugar; salt; raisins
normalized_ingredients: green papaya; carrot; ginger; bell pepper; vinegar; sugar; salt; raisins
instructions: Salt shredded papaya then squeeze dry. Simmer vinegar sugar ginger and salt. Combine with vegetables and chill before serving.

ingredients: day-old rice; garlic; salt; cooking oil; green onion optional
normalized_ingredients: day-old rice; garlic; salt; cooking oil; green onion optional
instructions: Fry minced garlic in oil until fragrant. Add day-old rice and stir-fry until hot. Season with salt and top with green onion.

ingredients: beef tapa; garlic fried rice; egg; tomato; cucumber; vinegar dip
normalized_ingredients: beef tapa; garlic fried rice; egg; tomato; cucumber; vinegar dip
instructions: Cook beef tapa until browned. Fry egg and prepare garlic rice. Plate with tomato cucumber and vinegar dip.

ingredients: tocino; garlic fried rice; egg; tomato; cucumber; vinegar dip
normalized_ingredients: tocino; garlic fried rice; egg; tomato; cucumber; vinegar dip
instructions: Pan-cook tocino until caramelized. Fry egg and prepare garlic rice. Serve together with tomato cucumber and vinegar dip.

ingredients: longganisa; garlic fried rice; egg; tomato; cucumber; vinegar dip
normalized_ingredients: longganisa; garlic fried rice; egg; tomato; cucumber; vinegar dip
instructions: Cook longganisa until browned. Fry egg and prepare garlic rice. Serve with tomato cucumber and vinegar dip.

ingredients: young coconut; pandan jelly; cream; condensed milk; nata de coco; tapioca pearls optional
normalized_ingredients: young coconut; pandan jelly; cream; condensed milk; nata de coco; tapioca pearls optional
instructions: Prepare pandan jelly and cut into cubes. Mix with young coconut cream condensed milk nata de coco and tapioca. Chill before serving.

ingredients: egg yolks; condensed milk; evaporated milk; sugar; vanilla extract
normalized_ingredients: egg yolks; condensed milk; evaporated milk; sugar; vanilla extract
instructions: Caramelize sugar in molds. Mix yolks condensed milk evaporated milk and vanilla gently. Steam until set then chill.

ingredients: shaved ice; evaporated milk; sweet beans; nata de coco; kaong; leche flan; ube halaya; pinipig
normalized_ingredients: shaved ice; evaporated milk; sweet beans; nata de coco; kaong; leche flan; ube halaya; pinipig
instructions: Layer sweet beans nata de coco kaong and other toppings in a glass. Add shaved ice milk leche flan ube and pinipig.

ingredients: saba banana; jackfruit; brown sugar; spring roll wrappers; cooking oil
normalized_ingredients: saba banana; jackfruit; brown sugar; spring roll wrappers; cooking oil
instructions: Place saba and jackfruit on wrapper with brown sugar. Roll tightly then fry until golden and caramelized. Drain and serve warm.
